subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the fragrances of God! A noble letter hath reached me, containing wondrous meanings, from one who in this world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من انجذب بنفحات الله قد وردنی کتاب کریم یتضمن معنی بدیع ممن له فی العالم
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @Manifestation of God as mediator, @praise and encouragement
